sentence_reviews.text: Training is coordinated across separated data holders while limiting raw-data movement or information leakage.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA/PML general distributed/data/privacy-adjacent learning context; no directly inspected entry naming federated learning or privacy-preserving learning.
sentence_reviews.notes: The definition is standard for federated/private learning, but the provided source pointers do not directly support the exact claim in inspected evidence.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Federated & privacy-preserving learning is to connect Distributed systems & networking, Datasets, sampling & splits to downstream capabilities including Privacy, governance, licensing & audit.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA distributed/networking background, data-management, fairness/bias/safety entries; PML data topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Distributed systems and datasets are plausible dependencies, and privacy/governance is thematically related, but the exact graph bridge is not directly supported.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Privacy, governance, licensing & audit
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA contents.html, ethics/safety/fairness/privacy-adjacent topics; no direct federated-learning evidence inspected.
sentence_reviews.notes: Privacy is directly relevant to privacy-preserving learning, but governance, licensing, and audit are broader and not directly supported.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA contents.html, distributed/networking background and learning-system/data entries.
sentence_reviews.notes: Federated learning is by nature coordinated across distributed participants; exact source pointer support is indirect.

sentence_reviews.text: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Distributed systems & networking, Datasets, sampling & splits.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA distributed/networking, data-management, and AI limits/safety entries; PML data topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: The dependency topics are plausible; the generic deployment-objective mismatch limitation is not directly supported.

sentence_reviews.text: Federated & privacy-preserving learning uses Distributed systems & networking as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA distributed/networking background and machine-learning system/data-management entries.
sentence_reviews.notes: Coordinating training across separated data holders implies distributed systems; exact evidence is indirect.

sentence_reviews.text: Federated & privacy-preserving learning uses Datasets, sampling & splits as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA/PML data, sampling, validation, and learning-system entries.
sentence_reviews.notes: Federated/private learning is about training over separated datasets; sampling/splits are broader but defensible.

sentence_reviews.text: Federated & privacy-preserving learning follows the learning setup expressed by Supervised learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA contents.html, Chapter 19 supervised learning and machine-learning system entries.
sentence_reviews.notes: Federated learning is often applied to supervised tasks, but privacy-preserving/federated learning is not necessarily supervised; common strength is plausible but not directly supported.

edge_reviews.notes: Federated training requires coordination across distributed parties; uses/core is defensible.
The node centers on training over separated datasets; uses/core is defensible, though sampling/splits are broader than raw-data locality.
Many federated-learning tasks are supervised, but the paradigm can also apply beyond supervised learning. trained_under/common is plausible but weakly evidenced.
